name: Canadian Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the bottom and sides of individual souffle dishes and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
2. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon colored, about 5 minutes.
3. Add cream cheese, cheddar cheese, sour cream, pimento, chives, and mustard to the beaten yolks. Mix well.
4. Using clean, dry beaters, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the egg whites into the yolk mixture alternately with the Canadian bacon. Mix until just combined.
6. Turn the souffle batter into individual souffle dishes.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
